title: COMMUNITY SERVICES - 211info
text: FAMILY PROMISE OF LINCOLN COUNTY COMMUNITY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides diapers and personal care items (such as shampoo, toothbrushes, and deodorant) when available. Households may visit once per month. 5030 SE Highway 101 Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Homeless and low-income families with children under age 18 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm, appointment required Email (541) 614-0964 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 614-0964 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lincoln County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Lincoln County Transit stop 1/2 block north Services: Diapers Personal/Grooming Supplies Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FAMILY SHELTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COMMUNITY CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FAMILY PROMISE OF LINCOLN COUNTY
